systems.name: opencode
systems.description: Self-hosted Claude-Code-derivative CLI/server/TUI/webapp bundle; this spec changes how the codex provider handles empty assistant turns

containers.name: codex provider (packages/opencode-codex-provider)
containers.description: Standalone provider package implementing AI SDK LanguageModelV2 against Codex Responses API

containers.name: opencode runtime (packages/opencode)
containers.description: Bun server hosting session workflow, runloop with empty-response guard / ? nudge logic

containers.name: in-process bus
containers.description: Pub/sub bus inside opencode runtime; codex.emptyTurn channel surfaces classifications to optional consumers

components.name: request-builder
components.description: buildResponsesApiRequest() in provider.ts; constructs Codex Responses body. No functional change in Phase 1; later may expose requestOptionsShape for audit logging.

components.name: ws-transport
components.description: transport-ws.ts; opens WS to chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex/responses, frames in/out. Tracks frameCount, terminalEventReceived. Replaces silent endStream() at line 422 with classifier call.

components.name: sse-pipeline
components.description: sse.ts; converts Codex SSE events to AI SDK LanguageModelV2StreamPart. Adds emittedTextDeltas counter. Flush block invokes classifier when no content was emitted.

components.name: empty-turn-classifier
components.description: NEW: empty-turn-classifier.ts; pure function (streamStateSnapshot, requestOptionsShape) -> {causeFamily, recoveryAction, suspectParams}. Single source of truth for cause-family discrimination per spec.md DD-9.

components.name: empty-turn-logger
components.description: NEW: empty-turn-log.ts; appends one JSON line to <state>/codex/empty-turns.jsonl per classification, mirrors to bus channel codex.emptyTurn. Failures swallowed with console.error breadcrumb (spec.md Forensic evidence preservation §3).

components.name: retry-dispatcher
components.description: Retry-once helper inside transport-ws.ts; for recoveryAction=retry-once-then-soft-fail, re-opens WS for the same body once. Caps at 1 retry per DD-7.

components.name: runloop-empty-response-guard
components.description: Existing ? nudge logic in opencode runloop. UNCHANGED in scope (D-4 keeps it broad). Reads providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification when present; passes through to nudge synthetic message.

components.name: empty-turns-jsonl
components.description: Append-only JSONL file at $XDG_STATE_HOME/opencode/codex/empty-turns.jsonl; load-bearing evidence path per D-2. External logrotate handles rotation per DD-3.

components.name: bus-channel-codex-empty-turn
components.description: In-process bus channel codex.emptyTurn; non-load-bearing convenience for live consumers. Subscribers may include future admin panel surface or telemetry shipper.

relationships.description: feeds parsed SSE frames into pipeline
on ws.onclose with frames-but-no-terminal, calls classifier with WS-layer state (frameCount, terminalEventReceived, wsCloseCode)
delegates retry dispatch when recoveryAction = retry-once-then-soft-fail
re-enters WS open + frame-loop with same body; caps at 1 attempt
in flush block, when emittedTextDeltas==0 && emittedToolCalls==0, calls classifier with SSE-layer state (finishReason, usage, deltas observed counts)
after classification, hands payload to logger (always; D-2)
returns {causeFamily, recoveryAction, suspectParams, logSequence} to flush block; flush emits finish part with classification in providerMetadata
appends one JSONL line per classification; load-bearing path
publishes same payload to bus; non-load-bearing convenience
fires ? nudge per existing logic (broad trigger, D-4); attaches classification metadata to nudge synthetic message
passes built request body to WS transport for streaming
